title: Add Persona AI Application to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Crafting new personas
gist.blurb: Persona AI just landed in the app showcase! It's a neat new tool for creators and storytellers to engineer the perfect character prompts.
gist.summary: Added Persona AI to the community app showcase, providing specialized character prompt engineering tools for creators.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Persona AI to craft precise, creative character prompts directly from the community showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The PR introduces a character prompt engineering app. Visually, this can be represented by Polly the bee acting as a creator or storyteller, perhaps holding theatrical masks or character sheets, surrounded by creative tools.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny director's beret, holding a small theatrical mask. A retro computer monitor nearby glows with lime green (#ecf874) text showing character profiles. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
